title: neottia nepalensis
intro: Neottia nepalensis, also known as the Nepal bee orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Neottia nepalensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a valuable resource for managing cardiovascular and respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, such as decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health problems, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
